name: Here There Be Dragons
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>超</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ちょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>災</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>さい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>禍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>か</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Special Summon 1 "Dragon Ruler" monster from your hand, GY, or banishment, then immediately after this effect resolves, you can Xyz Summon 1 "Dragon Ruler" Xyz Monster using only "Dragon Ruler" monsters you control. During your Main Phase: You can banish this card from your GY, then target any number of your banished "Dragon Ruler" monsters with different Attributes; return them to the GY. You can only use 1 "Here There Be Dragons" effect per turn, and only once that turn.
eff: Special Summon 1 "Dragon Ruler" monster from your hand, GY, or banishment, then immediately after this effect resolves, you can Xyz Summon 1 "Dragon Ruler" Xyz Monster using only "Dragon Ruler" monsters you control. During your Main Phase: You can banish this card from your GY, then target any number of your banished "Dragon Ruler" monsters with different Attributes; return them to the GY. You can only use 1 "Here There Be Dragons" effect per turn, and only once that turn.

action: Can only use certain Xyz Materials
Returns the player's banished cards to the Graveyard
summoning: Special Summons the player's banished monsters
Special Summons from your Extra Deck
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
